title: The Cambunctious Modpack
description: Performance, QoL features, and beautiful visuals while maintaining the Vanilla experience!
body:
# The Cambunctious Modpack

This modpack focuses on improving performance, adding some small(ish) quality-of-life features, and providing beautiful visuals - all while trying to keep the overall "Vanilla" experience. This pack is based on the mods I personally use, and I feel like they strike a great balance. 

This modpack is built for the Quilt modloader. It's set to *mostly* default settings, so adjust the settings according to your computer's capabilities and personal preferences.

This modpack includes a single resource pack - Ender Pears - which is created by myself (theCambunctious). You can find the original file at Planet Minecraft (https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ender-pears/). 

## Mods

---

| Mod | Authors/Maintainers/etc. | Reasoning |
|---|---|---|
| Cloth Config API | shedaniel | Required Dependency |
| Clumps | Jaredlll08, CFGrafanaStats | Performance |
| Controlling | Jaredlll08, CFGrafanaStats | QoL in menus |
| Cull Less Leaves | isxander | Performance/Visual improvement |
| DashLoader | alphaqu | Performance/QoL |
| Debugify | isxander | Performance |
| Enhanced Block Entities | FoundationGames | Performance |
| EntityCulling | tr7zw | Performance |
| Fastload | FluffyBumblebees, AbdElAziz333, JoostMSoftware | Performance/QoL |
| FerriteCore | malte0811 | Performance |
| ForgetMeChunk | BreadLoaf, henkelmax | Performance |
| Indium | comp500 | Performance |
| InvMove | PieKing1215 | I've played too much Apex Legends \:P |
| Inventory Sorting | Kyrptonaught | QoL feature that I love from the old days of 1.12 modpacks |
| Iris Shaders | coderbot, IMS212 | Adds shader compatibility (my go-to is ComplementaryShaders) |
| Krypton | astei | Performance |
| LazyDFU | astei | Performance |
| Lithium | jellysquid3, 2No2Name | Performance |
| Logical Zoom | LogicalGeekBoy | Gives the beloved "c to zoom" functionality |
| Memory Leak Fix | fxmorin | Fixes problems with certain other mods used in this pack |
| Mod Menu | Prospector, modmuss50, NeusFeat, jackassmc | Allows interfacing with mods and their options menus |
| More Culling | fxmorin | Performance |
| Mouse Tweaks | YaLTeR | QoL feature that I love from the old days of 1.12 modpacks |
| Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries | TheGlitch76, LambdAurora, OroArmor, Ennui | Required Dependency |
| Recipe Cache | biom4st3r1 | Performance |
| Reese's Sodium Options | FlashyReese | QoL for Sodium menu |
| Sodium | jellysquid3, burgerguy, IMS212 | Performance |
| Sodium Extras | FlashyReese | Performance |
| Starlight (Fabric) | spottedleaf | My preferred alternative to the "Phosphor" mod. |
